caption: A grid-style video conference displays multiple participants in a repeating pattern across several rows. The participants include a man in a plaid shirt and glasses, a man in a dark jacket and glasses, a woman with blonde hair wearing a headset, a woman with blonde hair resting her chin on her hand, a man in a grey jacket and glasses, and a man in a light-colored button-down shirt in front of a brick building. Other participants include a man with a beard in a dark jacket, a man in a black hoodie and glasses, and a man in a dark suit and glasses. The images cycle through these faces, repeating the same group of individuals in a shifting sequence. Each person remains in their own static home or office setting, appearing as a separate tile in the virtual meeting interface. No on-screen text or logos are clearly legible.
